title: Filter and collect elements from a list
description: Given a list of integers, filter out even numbers and collect them into a new list using Stream API.

title: Map strings to uppercase
description: Convert a list of strings to uppercase using the map() operation.

title: Find the sum of integers using reduce
description: Calculate the sum of all integers in a list using the reduce() operation.
hints: Use reduce with identity and accumulator

title: Check if any element matches a condition
description: Use anyMatch() to check if a list contains any element satisfying a given predicate.

title: Sort a list of strings
description: Sort a list of strings in natural order using Stream API and collect the result.

title: Find distinct elements
description: Remove duplicate elements from a list using the distinct() operation.

title: Limit and skip elements
description: Use limit() and skip() to implement pagination on a stream of elements.

title: Count elements in a stream
description: Count the number of elements in a stream that match a specific condition.

title: Find first element matching condition
description: Use findFirst() to retrieve the first element that matches a predicate.

title: Convert stream to array
description: Collect stream elements into an array using toArray() method.

title: Group elements by property
description: Use Collectors.groupingBy() to group a list of objects by a specific property.
hints: Can use method reference as classifier

title: Partition elements by predicate
description: Use Collectors.partitioningBy() to split a collection into two groups based on a predicate.

title: FlatMap nested collections
description: Flatten a list of lists into a single stream using flatMap() operation.
hints: flatMap transforms each element to a stream

title: Find max and min with custom comparator
description: Use max() and min() operations with a custom Comparator to find extreme values.

title: Collect to Map with key and value mappers
description: Use Collectors.toMap() to create a map from a stream with custom key and value extractors.
hints: Handle duplicate keys with merge function

title: Joining strings with delimiter
description: Use Collectors.joining() to concatenate strings with a delimiter, prefix, and suffix.

title: Calculate average using collectors
description: Compute the average of numeric values using Collectors.averagingInt/Double/Long().
hints: Can map to numeric type first

title: Peek for debugging streams
description: Use peek() to perform side-effect operations for debugging without affecting the stream.

title: Implement custom collector
description: Create a custom Collector implementation using Collector.of() for specialized aggregation.

title: Summarizing statistics
description: Use Collectors.summarizingInt/Double/Long() to get count, sum, min, max, and average in one pass.

title: Parallel stream processing with thread safety
description: Implement parallel stream processing ensuring thread-safe operations and proper use of concurrent collectors.

title: Downstream collectors with groupingBy
description: Use nested collectors with groupingBy() to perform complex aggregations on grouped data.

title: Implement lazy evaluation with Stream.generate
description: Create infinite streams using Stream.generate() or Stream.iterate() with proper termination conditions.

title: Optimize stream pipeline performance
description: Analyze and optimize a complex stream pipeline for performance, considering short-circuiting and operation order.

title: Implement teeing collector
description: Use Collectors.teeing() to apply two collectors simultaneously and merge their results.

title: Handle exceptions in stream operations
description: Design a strategy to handle checked exceptions within stream lambda expressions elegantly.

title: Implement custom spliterator
description: Create a custom Spliterator for efficient parallel processing of a custom data structure.

title: Reduce with complex accumulator
description: Implement a complex reduction operation using reduce() with identity, accumulator, and combiner for parallel streams.

title: Stream of optionals handling
description: Process a stream of Optional values efficiently, filtering empty values and extracting present values.

title: Implement sliding window with streams
description: Create a sliding window operation over a stream to process consecutive elements in groups.
hints: Use custom collector or external iteration
